meta.title: StampWallet
meta.tagline: Customer retention that lives in the wallet.

footer.tagline: Customer retention that lives in the wallet.

home.heroSub: Boost visit frequency with a wallet-native loyalty engine. No app download — just Apple Wallet and Google Wallet.
home.pocketSub: No app needed — a simple, powerful loyalty card for Apple and Google Wallet.
home.exploreFeaturesBody: Wallet passes, stamp and points programs, live updates, and analytics.
home.exploreIndustriesBody: Built for cafés, salons, gyms, restaurants, and more.
home.explorePricingBody: Start free. Upgrade when your loyalty program grows.

about.title: We sell customer retention, not wallet technology.
about.description: StampWallet helps small and medium businesses launch digital loyalty in minutes — bilingual Arabic and English, MENA/GCC first.
about.missionBody: Make loyalty as simple as a paper stamp card, with the reach of Apple Wallet and Google Wallet. Merchants get a dashboard. Customers never download an app.
about.v1Body: No accounts, no apps — just a pass in the wallet they already use.
about.v2Body: Signup to a live enrollment QR in under two minutes.
about.v3Body: Every scan updates the pass instantly. No lost cards, no fake stamps.

features.title: Everything you need for wallet loyalty
features.description: Programs, enrollment, scanning, live pass updates, and analytics — in one platform.
features.walletBody: Apple Wallet and Google Wallet passes branded to your business.
features.programsBody: Stamp cards, point cards, and multi-stage reward journeys.
features.updatesBody: Progress pushes to the customer’s phone after every staff scan.
features.analyticsBody: Enrollments, redemptions, and return activity at a glance.

featuresWallet.title: Your loyalty card lives in their wallet
featuresWallet.description: Customers add a pass with one tap. No app store, no login after enrollment.
featuresWallet.b1Body: Signed .pkpass cards with your brand colors, reward copy, and QR.
featuresWallet.b2Body: Loyalty objects that update when progress changes.
featuresWallet.b3Body: One source of truth for what the pass shows on both platforms.

featuresPrograms.title: Three program types, one dashboard
featuresPrograms.description: Pick the loyalty style that fits your business — all included in StampWallet.
featuresPrograms.stampBody: Buy 10, get 1 free style grids. Visual and familiar.
featuresPrograms.pointsBody: Accumulate points toward a reward threshold.
featuresPrograms.stepsBody: Unlock stages in sequence — Welcome to VIP.

featuresUpdates.title: The right update at the right time
featuresUpdates.description: When staff scan a pass, progress updates and the wallet pass refreshes — often with a lock-screen nudge.
featuresUpdates.b1Body: Award stamps or points and push the new pass state immediately.
featuresUpdates.b2Body: Customers see when a reward is ready to redeem.
featuresUpdates.b3Body: They don’t reopen an app to see new progress.

featuresAnalytics.title: Track success and see them come back
featuresAnalytics.description: Simple numbers that match your scan and redemption history.
featuresAnalytics.exportBody: Download customer lists as CSV for your own reporting.

industries.title: Built for how you actually operate
industries.description: From cafés to clinics — wallet loyalty that fits the counter, not a complex CRM.
industries.cafesBody: Classic stamp cards customers finish in a few visits.
industries.salonsBody: Points or journeys that reward regular appointments.
industries.restaurantsBody: Fast scans at the till without changing your POS.
industries.retailBody: Car washes, pet shops, pharmacies, and more.

infrastructure.title: Built for wallet passes that update live
infrastructure.description: Issuing, storing progress, and pushing Apple and Google updates — without enterprise complexity.
infrastructure.b1Body: Every merchant only sees their own programs and customers.
infrastructure.b2Body: Apple PassKit and Google Wallet payloads from one shared field model.
infrastructure.b3Body: Authenticated award and redeem endpoints with rate limits and audit logs.

pricing.title: Simple plans that scale with you
pricing.description: Start free. Upgrade when you need more programs or customers.
pricing.starterDesc: More programs, higher customer caps, custom branding
pricing.proDesc: Higher limits for growing multi-program businesses
pricing.note: Stripe billing unlocks when your keys are configured. Until then, Free plan works for development.

faqPage.title: Questions, answered.
faqPage.description: Everything merchants ask before launching StampWallet.

app.q: Do my customers need to download an app?
app.a: No. Passes live in Apple Wallet and Google Wallet. Customers add their card in seconds — nothing to download, no account to create.

paper.q: How does StampWallet replace a paper stamp card?
paper.a: Staff scan the customer’s QR. Stamps or points update on the pass in real time. Cards can’t be lost, forgotten, or faked.

cost.q: What does it cost to start?
cost.a: Start on the free plan with one active program. Upgrade to Starter or Pro when you need more programs and customers.

pos.q: Does it work with my POS?
pos.a: StampWallet runs independently of your POS — no till changes required. Staff scan from any phone on the dashboard.

industries.a: Cafés, bakeries, barbers, salons, gyms, restaurants, car washes, clinics, and more — bilingual Arabic and English for MENA/GCC first.

launch.q: How long does it take to launch?
launch.a: Most merchants go from signup to a live enrollment QR in under two minutes.
